---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Aegis
---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve? Be specific about the use case.

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you would like to see, including:

- How it would work
- What interfaces it would affect (CLI, API, both)
- Whether it has security implications

## Alternatives considered

What alternatives have you considered? Why is this approach better?

## Additional context

Any other context, examples, or references that would help understand the
request.
